Topic: Causal Inference

## Used in courses

- [EC202 - Applied Econometrics](../../course/ec202/ec202.html) [course]

## Lectures

- [Lecture 4 - Endogeneity and IV](../../collection/lecture-04/lecture-04.html) - ec202

## Concepts

- [Instrumental Variables Intuition](../../concept/iv-intuition/iv-intuition.html) - ec202

## Exercises

- [IV intuition check](../../exercise/ex-iv-concept-check/ex-iv-concept-check.html) - ec202

## Figures

- [IV DAG](../../figure/iv-dag-figure/iv-dag-figure.html) - ec202

## Resources

- [Instrumental Variables Episode](../../resource/angrist-podcast-iv/angrist-podcast-iv.html) - ec202
